name: Asuma Sarutobi
description: __Rank:__ Jounin Asuma is the leader of Team 10 (Nara Shikamaru, Yamanaka Ino, Akimichi Chouji), Kurenai's lover and the son of the third Hokage. Asuma smokes often but despite that, his skills are respected. He primarily uses Chakra Blades and can quickly dispatch his foes when the situation warrants. He is also proficient in Wind and Fire elements.

name: Danjuurou Tobita
description: __Height:__ 181cm (5'11") __Quirk:__ Elasticity Danjuro is a man with a refined appearance. He has a slicked back hairdo with a curl at the front. He sports a handlebar mustache along with a well-kept, medium-sized beard. Danjuro's clothes are also quite extravagant, featuring a jacket with enlarged collars and coattails, a pair of loose pinstriped pants and two belts. He also wears a pair of cuffs and a woolly scarf, and he uses a cane to walk.

name: Lisa Imai
description: __Height:__ 158 cm (5'2") __Instrument:__ ESP BTL Roselia Lisa Bass A student at Haneoka Girls' High School and Roselia's bassist. She follows gyaru fashion, but keeps her interest in amigurumi secret, since it does not match her image. She is good at baking cookies and is part of the dance club at school. Lisa is best friends and next-door neighbors with Yukina, and they have been good friends since they were young. Outside of the band, Lisa is also friends with Moca, who is her coworker at her

name: Shizu Delta
description: One of the members of the battle maids originally created by someone except for Tabula Smaragdina. CZ2I28 Delta is an automaton battle maid and member of the "Pleiades Six Stars," the battle maid squad of the Great Tomb of Nazarick. CZ2128 appears emotionless and has a silent nature. Her Karma is relatively high, which makes her, along with Yuri Alpha, one of the two "safe" Pleiades to humans. Though she usually ignores conversations from humans, sometimes there is a possibility to communicate w

name: Shou Naruse
description: Shou Naruse is very straightforward and arrogant. He doesn't care what other people think of him. He is very tall and he has piercings on both of his ears. He is the ace player of the Ryuhoku High's basketball team and has been a basketball player since he was 6 years old. He was tall since he was a kid so he was considered as the "most important player" in their team even though he plays the game with little effort. He likes his manager, Yuki. name: Luna
description: Luna was a talking cat and advisor to [Usagi Tsukino.](https://anilist.co/character/2030/Usagi-Tsukino) It was she who first detected Usagi's power, but at the time did not realize that she was the Moon Princess. Luna and her partner [Artemis](https://anilist.co/character/5408/Artemis) were advisors to [Queen Serenity](https://anilist.co/character/17010/Queen-Serenity) in the Silver Millennium, and when the kingdom was ruined Serenity used the power of her Silver Crystal to send the two cats to

name: Mona Megistus
description: __Vision:__ Hydro __Constellation:__ Astrolabos A mysterious young astrologer who proclaims herself to be "Astrologist Mona Megistus," and who possesses abilities to match the title. Erudite, but prideful. Though she is often strapped for cash and lives a life of thrift, she is resolved to never use astrology for profit. It is this very resolution that has caused her to constantly fret about money. Her astrology relies upon the technique of Hydromancy with the underlying principle she explained

name: Peko Pekoyama
description: __Height:__ 172 cm (5'6") __Talent:__ Ultimate Swordswoman A student of Hope's Peak Academy Class 77-B, and a participant of the Killing School Trip featured in _Danganronpa 2: Goodbye Despair_. Peko initially appears to be rather serious and intimidating, expressing little emotion. However, she isn't unsociable and doesn't mean to act cold. description: Fai's introduction is in chapter two of the manga, in which he is shown sealing away King Ashura of Celes country at the bottom of a pool. He transforms his creation Chii (originally from Chobits) into a net-like shield, instructing her to alert him if King Ashura should awake. He then uses his magic to transport himself through dimensions, to the shop of the Space-Time Witch, Yuuko Ichihara. name: Ha-Yan Park
description: **Height:** 160 cm (5'3") A girl who conceals her identity as one of the strongest pureblood vampires in order to live normally as a college student. However, she cannot ignore injustice caused by others of her kind. She is infamously known as the 'White-Haired Vampire' by other vampires.

name: Shin  Wolford
nativeName: シン ウォルフォード
description: He is the main character of Kenja no Mago. After dying in a car accident. He was reincarnated into an unknown world carrying with him a vague memory of his previous life in his previous world. (Source: Kenja no Mago Wiki)

description: An African-American boy, and member of Ash's gang.

name: Sora
description: Sora is the protagonist of the Kingdom Hearts role-playing video game series. He is an upbeat and cheerful teenager and though he may seem simple-minded and naive at times, he possesses an unwavering heart and his strong sense of justice is extraordinary. At times, he is impulsive and quick to anger, but he is always sincere about what he says and does. He comes from Destiny Islands and is best friends with Riku and Kairi. name: Guideau
description: A feral, violent girl with long fangs and the eyes of a beast. A witch's curse can be seen in the form of a rose tattoo on her collarbones. Guideau currently works for the Order of Magical Resonance, a group that works by magic, for magic and of magic. Her partner is Ashaf. ~!Guideau's true form is locked inside Ashaf's coffin. She is originally a man who's extremely powerful, considered to be a witch's "one true natural enemy". Her current appearance is the result of a witch's curse.!~

name: Fuuka Ayase
description: The middle Ayase sister, Fuuka is in her second year at a local high school. She is the most responsible of the sisters, and during Yotsuba's first visit to her school, one student calls her "vice-president." She finds herself frequently helping the Koiwais, even though she does not intend to and is more flustered by their eccentricities than anyone else.
